title: S/ AgentOS Command Envelope v0.2.0
description: Canonical command envelope for all S/ AgentOS kernel operations.

trace_id.description: Distributed trace identifier. Propagated across all workflow steps.

idempotency_key.description: Optional idempotency key to prevent duplicate live execution.

objective.description: Human-readable description of the desired outcome. Required, non-empty.

requested_by.description: Identifier of the operator or system submitting this command.

run_mode.description: Execution mode. draft/dry_run/read_only are safe. live requires approval for write actions.

approval_status.description: Approval gate status. live write actions require approved.

agent_id.description: Target agent code or identifier for agent-specific actions.

metadata.description: Caller metadata: client type, session info, source system.
